raw_linear_lower_bound.statement: for all even n > rawThreshold, coefficient * n <= RawVonMangoldtGoldbachSum(n)

contamination_dominated.statement: for all even n > contaminationThreshold, 2 * vonMangoldtWeightSumContaminationBudget(canonicalNonPrimePrimePowerVonMangoldtWeightSumBound, n) < coefficient * n

notes: Template only. This is the positive-linear raw route with canonical weight-sum control and an explicit contamination threshold. The analytic side supplies a pointwise positive linear raw von Mangoldt lower bound and an explicit domination of the canonical contamination budget. Lean derives the final direct raw weight-sum threshold from rawThreshold and contaminationThreshold, avoiding any need to bound the noncomputable canonicalLinearContaminationThreshold.
